headline: Roth Capital Raises its Price Target on ON Semiconductor (ON) to $125
summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) is one of the 9 Best American Semiconductor Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On May 5, 2026, Roth Capital raised the firm’s price target on ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) to $125 from $70 while maintaining a Buy rating. headline: Can ON's AI Data Center Momentum Drive a Multi-Year Growth Cycle?
